title: 'avah #0183
definition:
1) desire, incline, covet, wait longingly, wish, sigh, want,
    be greedy, prefer
    1a) (Piel) to desire, crave (food and drink)
    1b) (Hithpael) to desire, long for, lust after (of bodily appetites)
nasbUsage:

    be greedy, prefer
    1a) (Piel) to desire, crave (food and drink)

    NASB:  to incline, desire
